title: yazoo.tf Refabricated
description: A kitchen-sink modpack that balances performance, exploration, creativity, and RPG progression and invites players to build, travel, trade, and thrive in a beautiful, living world.
body:
## 🌍Adventure Awaits in a Living, Expansive World!
Explore farther, build smarter, and grow stronger in a world powered by _Create_, _Terralith_, and _Tectonic_.  This modpack combines deep RPG progression with engineering creativity and seamless performance, creating an experience centered around multiplayer worlds that feel alive, vast, and worth exploring.
### 🧭Explore a Truly Expansive World
Venture through stunning, procedurally enhanced landscapes from _Terralith_ and _Tectonic_, with _Distant Horizons_ extending your view to the horizon and beyond. Every biome feels new, every mountain climb rewarding, and every expedition an adventure of its own.

Take to the skies with _Immersive Aircraft_, set sail with _Small Ships_, or forge rail lines using _Create_ to connect your settlements across continents.
### ⚔️RPG Progression and Combat Depth
Experience true character growth with _LevelZ_ and the _RPG Series_ of mods, including Archers, Warriors, Wizards, and more.

Find and forge legendary weapons with _Simply Swords_ and _Mythic Metals_, master enchanting and crafting systems, and personalize your combat style with _Enchancement_ and _Better Combat_.
### 🪙A World with Purpose and Trade
Trade, earn, and spend with _Numismatic Overhaul_, introducing a gold/silver/copper currency system for immersive multiplayer economies. Whether you’re a merchant, adventurer, or builder, every coin counts in a world driven by exploration and ingenuity.
### ⚙️Powered by _Create_
Build complex machinery, automated farms, and transport systems using _Create_ and expansions: _Steam ’n Rails_, _Bells & Whistles_, _Structures_, and more.
The modpack’s world encourages collaboration and creativity, rewarding those who engineer solutions to survival and exploration challenges.
### 🚀Performance and Stability
Packed with performance-enhancing mods like _Sodium_, _Lithium_, _FerriteCore_, _ModernFix_, and _ImmediatelyFast_, this modpack runs smoother than most large content packs while preserving visual richness and gameplay depth.
### 🤝Built for Multiplayer, Enjoyable Solo
Whether you’re joining friends on a dedicated server or embarking on your own journey, everything is tuned for consistent multiplayer performance, balanced progression, and shared adventure.
